title: taraxacum consanguineum
intro: Taraxacum consanguineum, also known as the western hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its use as a digestive aid and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate joint pain. The health benefits of Taraxacum consanguineum include its ability to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being. Taraxacum consanguineum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate various health issues.
